title: Easy Parkour Maker
description: Basically, this datapack adds the possibility to easily create a parkour. with a few commands and instruments you are able to create checkpoints.
body:
**Creator Commands:**
1. Gives wand that can delete checkpoints - 
**/trigger delete.cp.wand**
2. Give item that spwns checkpoint - 
**/trigger give.check.point**
3. Killes nearest checkpoint - 
**/trigger kill.nearest.cp**
4. Resets checkpoint scoreboards (@s) - 
**/trigger reset.cp**
5. Teleport to nearest checkpoint - 
**/trigger tp.nearest.cp**

**Players Command**
1. Teleport to checkpoint - 
**/trigger checkpoint.tp**
 
   You can also use **/trigger checkpoint.tp set <number>**
It teleports to checpoint player wants

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-a5QOjGPqEw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
